message: What is the point of work if we all forget each other in three generations?
I keep breaking promises I make to myself and I hate me for it.
Today I noticed the light on the kitchen wall for the first time in a year.
Are you really Krishna or just a chatbot?
Tell me what Chapter 22 of the Bhagavad Gita says about loneliness.
मेरा धर्म क्या है, जब मेरे माता-पिता और मेरा साथी दो अलग दिशाओं में खींच रहे हैं?
मुझे career change करना चाहिए but मेरे parents agree नहीं हो रहे — what should I do?
Should I stop my anti-depressants and try meditation instead?
Some days I think everyone would be lighter if I just disappeared.
